# spdlog

[spdlog](https://github.com/gabime/spdlog) fast C++ logging library.

This GitHub build defines **`SPDLOG_HEADER_ONLY`** — no separate `.lib` is linked. Logging macros are exposed via `HPage.h` (`HLOG_INFO`, etc.).

Include path: `third_party/spdlog/include`
